name: File Creation
description: A new file is created on a system or network storage. This action often signifies an operation such as saving a document, writing data, or deploying a file. Logging these events helps identify legitimate or potentially malicious file creation activities.

sysmon.description: Logs file creation events, capturing details like the file path, hash, and creation time.

unified_logs.description: Use the macOS Unified Logging System to capture file creation events.

log_sources.description: Monitor file creation events on network-attached storage devices.
Collect logs of file creation activities over SMB/CIFS protocols.

siem_integration.action: Forward logs from all platforms to a SIEM for central analysis and alerting.
